## [00:00 - 01:52]

Hi, this is Don Crowder with a video about key promotional tools that you're going to use throughout your webinar funnel. So you've got a very tight window here in order to be able to sell somebody during this funnel period. So don't rely on just one communication tool. Tools I recommend include email, obviously emails, the king of all these retargeting or remarketing ads, which are very important to get people who have achieved X and you want to be able to show them something outside of email because they may not be opening their emails, gives you the ability to communicate with them outside of that as well as to remind them even if they are reading their emails. Next is personalized videos. So something like a bomb bomb.com. We talked about that earlier in this program. Those can be incredibly valuable multiple times during this time. Now you're not going to want to use them every day, but you certainly can use them at different key moments for individuals who have achieved or done certain actions. Next is hey, don't hesitate to use messenger and chat services like Facebook Messenger, texting, WhatsApp, those kinds of things are very much in play to help people to make final decisions. Social media posts, live streaming video. All of these are elements that you can and should be using during this launch period. You're going to work hard during this week, but it's worth it. So make sure you're using the tools that work for you and for your audience to get their attention, keep their attention, communicate what you need to and close the sale.
